title: Oil market gripped by record volatility and speculation since start of Middle East war
subhed: Brent crude and diesel prices have surged since the start of the US-Israeli military intervention in Iran. Behind the scenes, major trading firms and oil giants have monitored every move of oil tankers and watched closely for any drone attack.

title: War in Iran: At the G7, Canada and its partners want clarification from Washington

Baltic states fear Ukraine war could spill over onto their territory
subhed: Two Ukrainian drones launched against Russia accidentally landed in Estonia and Latvia. This incident comes as the scenario of a fictional pro-Russian republic, orchestrated by Moscow to justify a military intervention, spreads in the Baltic states.

title: United States and Israel are facing the same Iranian foe but are fighting different wars
subhed: Donald Trump and Benjamin Netanyahu share many objectives. However, their respective public opinions and electoral interests may ultimately highlight significant differences between the two leaders.

title: Napoleon's long-lost hat to go on display
subhed: Made by Poupard, Napoleon's official hatmaker, the headpiece displays all the hallmark features of an authentic imperial bicorne, including its distinctive proportions, a small tricolor cockade and a silk-taffeta lining. It will be exhibited at the Chateau de Chantilly, north of Paris, later in the year.

title: They were adopted and raised middle-class. France saw them as Black and Arab
subhed: Youssef Dridi and Eyob Bressy, both adopted and raised by families with significant cultural capital in the Paris region, share how, from adolescence, they experienced discrimination due to their skin color.

title: The serial-poisoning mother and daughter inspired by 'Breaking Bad'
subhed: Castor beans, wolfsbane, antifreeze, rat poison: Carole D. and Amélie D. considered every possible method to poison the former's partner, Enrique B. The two women are set to stand trial before a criminal court in western France starting March 25.
